briefdescription.para: Controller is initialized by udc_init() and can generate the VBUS events, if capable, but shall not be recognizable by host.
Controller is enabled and all API functions are available, controller is recognizable by host.
Controller is suspended by the host.
Maximum packet size of control endpoint supported by the controller.
Device is probably not connected.
Device is connected to a full speed bus.
Device is connected to a high speed bus
Device is connected to a super speed bus.
USB device actual speed.
VBUS ready event.

detaileddescription.para: Signals that VBUS is in stable condition.

briefdescription.para: VBUS removed event.

detaileddescription.para: Signals that VBUS is below the valid range.

briefdescription.para: Device resume event.
Device suspended event.
Port reset detected.
Start of Frame event.
Endpoint request result event.
Non-correctable error event, requires attention from higher levels or application.
USB device controller event types.

memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const struct udc_event *const event)
memberdef.name: udc_event_cb_t

briefdescription.para: Callback to submit UDC event to higher layer.

detaileddescription.para: At the higher level, the event is to be inserted into a message queue. (TBD) Maybe it is better to provide a pointer to k_msgq passed during initialization.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to device struct of the driver instance

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

briefdescription.para: New USB device controller (UDC) driver API.
